name: Accent Group Limited
analysis: AX1 has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 54% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.7450, stop A$0.5445, target A$0.8834 (0.69:1) — then trail it.
